summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portfolio Performance Charts feature. Fixed backend bug (missing alpaca_headers attribute). All 17 backend API tests pass. All 24 frontend UI elements verified working correctly.

fixed.issue: Missing alpaca_headers attribute in MultiAPIClient causing 'MultiAPIClient' object has no attribute 'alpaca_headers' error

passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: GET /api/account returns account data (401 expected with invalid Alpaca keys)
Backend: GET /api/positions returns positions list (401 expected with invalid Alpaca keys)
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/analytics returns all expected fields (period, history, drawdowns, max_drawdown, win_rate, sector_allocation, pnl_breakdown, strategy_performance)
Backend: Portfolio analytics period 1D works
Backend: Portfolio analytics period 1W works
Backend: Portfolio analytics period 1Y works
Backend: Portfolio analytics period ALL works
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/history returns history and period
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/drawdown returns drawdowns and max_drawdown
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/win-rate returns overall and trend
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/sector-allocation returns allocation and position_count
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/pnl-breakdown returns realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, total_pnl, avg_trade_return
Backend: GET /api/portfolio/strategy-performance returns performance array with strategy data
Backend: Win rate data structure validation
Backend: P&L breakdown data structure validation
Backend: Analytics response time < 10s
Frontend: Portfolio page renders with data-testid
Frontend: Header shows 'Portfolio Analytics'
Frontend: Period selector (1 Month) present and functional
Frontend: Refresh button present and functional
Frontend: Account Summary cards (Total Equity, Day P&L, Cash, Buying Power)
Frontend: Win Rate summary row (Win Rate, Total Trades, Wins/Losses, Max Drawdown)
Frontend: Chart tabs (Equity, Drawdown, Win Rate, Strategy, Sectors) all present
Frontend: Tab switching works correctly
Frontend: Equity chart shows 'No portfolio history available' (expected with no Alpaca data)
Frontend: Drawdown chart shows 'No drawdown data available' (expected)
Frontend: Win Rate chart shows 'No trade history' (expected)
Frontend: Strategy Performance chart shows backtest data with bars (momentum, mean_reversion)
Frontend: Sector Allocation shows 'No positions for sector allocation' (expected)
Frontend: P&L Breakdown section shows Realized, Unrealized, Total P&L, Avg Trade Return
Frontend: Period selector changes from 1M to 1Y
Frontend: Refresh button shows toast notification
Frontend: No positions message shows when empty
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing alpaca_headers attribute in MultiAPIClient class - was causing portfolio history and trade history to fail
All portfolio analytics endpoints working correctly
Strategy performance shows real backtest data from MongoDB
Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - this is expected and handled gracefully by the UI
seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing backtest data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio Performance Charts feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: /api/portfolio/analytics (comprehensive), /api/portfolio/history, /api/portfolio/drawdown, /api/portfolio/win-rate, /api/portfolio/sector-allocation, /api/portfolio/pnl-breakdown, /api/portfolio/strategy-performance. Frontend shows all charts with proper empty states when no Alpaca data. Strategy tab shows real backtest data. Note: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - this is expected and handled gracefully.

endpoints: GET /api/portfolio/analytics - Comprehensive analytics with all data

page_elements: Header with period selector and refresh button
Account Summary cards (Equity, Day P&L, Cash, Buying Power)
Win Rate summary row (Win Rate, Total Trades, Wins/Losses, Max Drawdown)
Chart tabs (Equity, Drawdown, Win Rate, Strategy, Sectors)
charts: Strategy Performance chart (BarChart with Avg Return % and Avg Win Rate %)

bug_fixed.issue: Portfolio history and trade history failing with 'MultiAPIClient' object has no attribute 'alpaca_headers'
bug_fixed.root_cause: PortfolioAnalytics class was using api_client.alpaca_headers but this attribute was not defined in MultiAPIClient
bug_fixed.fix: Added alpaca_headers property to MultiAPIClient.__init__() with APCA-API-KEY-ID and APCA-API-SECRET-KEY headers
